reason: GoldenEye strips spycraft of glamor into a gritty, paranoid Cold War scheme gone awry
Mission: Impossible portrays a weary agent on a compromised romp of double-crosses and wet, cold betrayals
Jackal, The follows an unglamorous, exhausted operative in a murky game of betrayal and mounting suspicion
Hunt for Red October traps its commander in a tense, damp undersea standoff full of paranoia and mistrust
Crimson Tide stages a claustrophobic, soaked-through submarine mutiny driven by hard-edged betrayal
Absolute Power shows a burnt-out thief tangled in covert plots, spying on corrupt power players in gloom
Clear and Present Danger casts CIA officers into a murky, damp mission where every order feels suspect
Kiss the Girls is a grim cat-and-mouse thriller of ex-agents chasing a remorseless predator in shadowy terrain
Copycat finds a forensic psychologist dragged into a bleak, compromised hunt for a cunning serial killer
Natural Born Killers flips the glamorous myth of vigilantes into a raw, cynical spree of distrust and betrayal
